ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., men's, women's, children's) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Standard size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "au_size" INTEGER /* Size in Australia */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* Size in the United States */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* Size in the United Kingdom */,
  "eur_size" INTEGER /* Size in Europe */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("product_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "product_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size conversion entry */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock for this size */,
  "restock_level" INTEGER /* Restock level for the product size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken in the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "vat_rate" TEXT /* Value Added Tax (VAT) rate for the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size sold */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the sale occurred */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "sale_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
